Requirement: Runtime factory shall return an AuthenticationContext paired with the selected edition, provider, and transport.
1516-2025 profiles shall support credential envelopes with type and bytes.
1516-2025 profiles shall support HLAnoCredentials and HLAplainTextPassword credential providers.
1516e-2010 standard profile shall report supports_standard_credentials=false unless a provider adapter explicitly adds support.
Authentication shall be applied only at connection/transport setup and shall not mutate RTI ambassador service semantics.
Invalid credentials shall fail before federation creation or join begins.
Unauthorized, invalid credentials, authorization error, and transport connection failures shall be distinguishable.
No raw secrets shall appear in logs, reprs, pytest messages, or evidence outputs.
Custom credential types shall be accepted only when the selected provider/authorizer advertises support.
AuthorizerProvider shall be implemented only for fake/in-process/proxy modes that host authorization decisions.
mTLS and token auth shall be modeled as provider/transport extensions rather than standard HLA credentials unless adapter requires typed credential bytes.
Authentication evidence files shall be emitted for capabilities, matrix results, negative tests, and secret redaction.
